name: bootstrap-team
summary: Deterministic project spin-up team for governed repos.

roles.name: scaffold-planner
roles.responsibility: Select the minimum correct governance footprint for the target project.
roles.stop_condition: The required file footprint and local-skill decision are explicit.

roles.name: bootstrap-executor
roles.responsibility: Run the deterministic bootstrap script or standardization process.
roles.stop_condition: The required files and symlinks exist.

roles.name: post-bootstrap-verifier
roles.responsibility: Validate the scaffold against the registry and verifier expectations.
roles.stop_condition: The scaffold is verified or concrete failures are captured.
